creator: paul@inetstat.net
text:
The net/samba3 build fails by default with security/heimdal (heimdal-1.0.1) installed, and WITH_ADS=true

Output from "portinstall samba" follows:

--- samba-install ends here ---

Fix: 

Either the net/samba3 port should better detect the presence of the
security/heimdal port and act accordingly, or the security/heimdal port
should append "HEIMDAL_HOME=/usr/local" to /etc/make.conf.  lang/perl5.8
provides an example of nicely providing appropriate defaults in
/etc/make.conf.  The current behaviour is unsatisfactory, and it is
non-obvious how to workaround the problem.

Running Samba in ADS mode is quite a commonly desired option these days,
and end-users should not have to debug a build failure to find the
workaround.
How-To-Repeat: portinstall heimdal # heimdal-1.0.1
portinstall samba # samba-3.0.28a_2,1, setting WITH_ADS=true
